summary: Joel announces version 2.1 of the FogBugz Add-in for Visual Studio, which fixes several bugs. The update improves position persistence across sessions and better handles SSL and authenticated installations. He thanks specific community members for their detailed bug reports that helped identify and resolve the issues.
key_points: FogBugz for Visual Studio 2.1 released with multiple bug fixes
Key improvements include remembering window position and better SSL/authentication support
Community bug reports were instrumental in identifying and fixing problems
money_quotes: Thanks to Olivier, James, Matt, Jason, Alan, and Miguel for detailed bug reports which helped me track down and fix all these problems.
key_insight: A brief product update announcement highlighting bug fixes and thanking community contributors for their detailed reports.
